input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Toronto General Hospital. There are 35 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "mental", "count": 10, "message": "10 mental patients incoming", "protocol": "Crisis team activation \u2014 psychiatric surge"}, {"category": "injury", "count": 7, "message": "7 injury patients incoming", "protocol": "Mass casualty protocol consideration"}, {"category": "general", "count": 3, "message": "3 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}, {"category": "gi", "count": 8, "message": "8 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}, {"category": "respiratory", "count": 4, "message": "4 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}, {"category": "pain", "count": 3, "message": "3 pain patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor pain cluster trend"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 85, "current_utilization": 58, "recommendation": "Projected full in ~85 min. Monitor closely. Prepare contingency."}. Diversion recommendations: []. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: Charge nurse, expect 35 incoming patients, with the facility projected to reach full capacity within 85 minutes. Immediately activate the crisis team for 10 mental health patients and implement infection control protocols for 8 GI patients. Additionally, consider isolation for 4 respiratory patients and mass casualty protocols for 7 injury patients, and prepare contingencies as capacity will be reached quickly.
